economic_notes: Nation has significant business interests across retail/services, natural resources, and industrial sectors through 14 GBEs with combined revenue of $44.26M and net income of $6.71M. Subsequent event: $15M specific claim settlement offer received from Government of Canada for Rebecca Spit - Drew Harbour IR9. Two long-term commercial lease agreements (50-55 years) signed post year-end generating $2.7M in prepaid rents.
notes: Fiscal year 2022, not 2024. Nation has 4 consolidated subsidiaries (Quinsam Properties BT Inc., Quinsam Reserve Leasing Inc., 1223053 BC Ltd., Cape Mudge Developments Ltd.) and 14 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Total GBE revenue is $44.26M not consolidated line-by-line. Due from GBEs of $13.1M is a significant financial asset. Subsequent event: $15M specific claim settlement offer from Canada received May/June 2022 - not recorded in these statements. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + BC + FNHA + CMHC + NVIAATS + KDC + FNESC = $9,027,369. OSR includes GBE income ($5.73M), taxation, lease/rental, tobacco, recoveries, interest, and other.
